questionHtml:
A vessel contains a mass X of helium gas and a mass 2X of oxygen gas.

Molar mass of helium = 4 g

Molar mass of oxygen = 32 g

What is the number of helium atomsnumber of oxygen molecules?


A.  18

B.  14

C.  4

D.  8
